title: Long-context deterministic aggregate
description: The relational reduce from an RLM-shaped labeling task: once rows are labeled, the distributional query is one exact GROUP BY and the source rows remain outside model context. Labels are pre-given here. The semantic map, persistent root loop, and recursive model calls that define RLM are not implemented by this manifest.

resolvers.title: DuckDB file scan
resolvers.description: Read a file into a table.
